name: growthos
description: Autonomous marketing team for Claude Code — 7 AI agents, 9 skills, 3 MCP servers, one `/grow` command.

scripts.studio: cd remotion && npx remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.studio:simple: cd remotion && npx remotion studio index.ts
scripts.render: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelTips ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:reel: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelTips ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:before-after: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelBeforeAfter ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:numbers: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelNumbers ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:explainer: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ExplainerSteps ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:demo: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts ExplainerDemo ../out/video.mp4
scripts.render:carousel: cd remotion && npx remotion render src/index.ts CarouselAnimated ../out/video.mp4
scripts.preview: cd remotion && npx remotion still src/index.ts ReelTips ../out/preview.png --frame=45
scripts.compositions: cd remotion && npx remotion compositions src/index.ts

author: GrowthOS Community
